posting.sourceTitle: North Atlantic State Carpenters Training Fund
posting.sponsorName: North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund
posting.locationSummary: Capital District, Central, Finger Lakes, Mohawk Valley, North Country, Southern Tier, and Western regions of New York
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at local1163.com using the Join Us tab any time during the recruitment period. Applications must be received online by May 30, 2027.
posting.applicationHours: Any day and any time during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old; proof is required at enrollment or with a bona fide offer of employment.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within the jurisdiction of North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund, which includes all New York counties except Dutchess, Nassau, Orange, Putnam, Rockland, Suffolk, Westchester, Kings, Queens, Bronx, New York, and Richmond.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various jobsites and required classes at the approved school, and must have a valid driver’s license. Apprentice may be required to operate company vehicles.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug test, at the sponsor’s expense, after selection and before enrollment. Drug testing may be administered at any time during the program.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend all related instruction classroom training as required to complete the apprenticeship program.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old; proof will be required at time of enrollment or bona fide offer of employment.
Must pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship. Drug testing may be administered at any time during the program.

Must sign an affidavit indicating that they are physically able to perform Millwright work, including climbing and working from heights, on scaffolds, in confined spaces and underground; lifting a minimum of 50 pounds; performing repetitive motions; using precision tools such as Vernier calipers, micrometers, dial indicators, levels, gauge blocks, and optical laser alignment tooling; working in inclement weather including rain, snow, cold, heat, and direct sunlight; and standing and stooping for prolonged periods of time.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various jobsites and required classes at the approved school.
Must have a valid driver’s license. Apprentice may be required to operate company vehicles.
Must be a US citizen or legally be able to work in the USA.
Must attend all related instruction classroom training as required to complete the apprenticeship program.

Must reside within the jurisdiction of North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund, which includes all counties in New York State except Dutchess, Nassau, Orange, Putnam, Rockland, Suffolk, Westchester, Kings, Queens, Bronx, New York, and Richmond.
Must provide a copy of DD-214, if applicable, at time of enrollment or bona fide offer of employment.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, live within the sponsor’s jurisdiction, have reliable transportation and a valid driver’s license, be legally able to work in the U.S., attend required classroom instruction, and pass a drug test after selection. Applicants must also be physically able to perform millwright work.
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact Eastern Millwright Regional Council at (315) 277-7808.
